'''Bornecks''' were [[Near-Human]]s native to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Vellity]].

==Biology and appearance==
Borneck skin tones varied from pale yellow to orange-brown. They were patient, sensible pacifists, and farmers who enjoyed hard work and holidays. They lived to an average of one hundred twenty standard years.<ref name="AE" />

==Society and culture==
The Borneck were a peaceful species, with a intense work ethic and patient demeanor. They valued hard work and had a very close-knit society. Borneck life revolved around family and community. Young Borneck were expected to get an education, and job, and then raise a family. While primarily employed in manual labor jobs, Bornecks were also skilled [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] and often found work on [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttles]] and [[Freighter/Legends|tramp freighters]].<ref name="AE" />

==History==
The Bornecks originated on the temperate [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Vellity]]<ref name="AE" /> in the [[Vellity system/Legends|system of the same name]], located in the [[Trax sector/Legends|Trax sector]] of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]].<ref name="TEA-OC">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}}</ref> Many Bornecks migrated to the [[Agriworld/Legends|agriworld]] of [[Draenell's Point]]. 30% of the population of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] were Borneck.<ref name="CC">''[[Classic Campaigns]]''</ref> [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Danetta Pitta]] hid the fact that he had a Borneck ancestor.<ref name="I66">{{InsiderCite|66|Who's Who: Imperial Grand Admirals}}</ref>
